scripts.package:macos:unsigned: npm run prepare:libmpv:sonoma && npm run tauri:build:macos && npm run verify:macos-runtime && npm run dmg:macos
scripts.package:macos:local: npm run prepare:libmpv:sonoma && npm run tauri:build:macos && npm run verify:macos-runtime && npm run sign:macos && npm run dmg:macos
scripts.package:macos:release: npm run prepare:libmpv:sonoma && npm run tauri:build:macos && npm run verify:macos-runtime && npm run sign:macos && npm run dmg:macos && MACOS_NOTARIZE_REQUIRED=1 MACOS_NOTARIZE=1 npm run notarize:macos
scripts.package:windows: npm run prepare:windows-mpv && npm run tauri:build:windows
scripts.package:all: npm run package:macos:release && npm run package:windows
